allow: Bash(pm2 logs --lines 30 --nostream 2>/dev/null || journalctl -u pm2 --lines 30 --no-pager 2>/dev/null || echo "No logs found")
Bash(pm2 restart all && sleep 3 && pm2 logs --lines 50 --nostream 2>/dev/null)

Bash(npx prisma db execute --stdin 2>&1 << 'EOF'
SELECT "name", "apiUrl", "isActive", 
  CASE WHEN "apiKey" IS NULL THEN 'NOT SET' ELSE SUBSTRING\("apiKey", 1, 8\) || '...' END as apiKeyPrefix
FROM "ApiCredential";
EOF)

Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "SELECT \\"name\\", \\"apiUrl\\", \\"isActive\\", CASE WHEN \\"apiKey\\" IS NULL THEN 'NOT SET' ELSE SUBSTRING\(\\"apiKey\\", 1, 8\) || '...' END as apiKeyPrefix FROM \\"ApiCredential\\";" 2>&1)
